The '''Etti''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[near-Human]]s who were originally native to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]].

==Biology and appearance==
Etti had pale skin and delicate frames; their general appearance was very lanky.<ref name="AE" />

==Society and culture==
The Etti had a strong isolationist culture which lead them to exorcise themselves from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. They mainly concerned themselves with physical appearance and the accumulation of wealth. They prided themselves on their skills in land and resource management.<ref name="AE" />

==History==
They fled persecution in the Core Worlds and resettled on [[Etti (planet)|Etti]] approximately [[20,000 BBY/Legends|twenty thousand years prior]] to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. They used [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] and advanced bioengineering to make their homeworld idyllic.<ref name="AE" />

The [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] approached the Etti and offered them control of an entire system if they would relocate to [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]] and transform it into a vacation world. The species agreed and most of them relocated to the new planet.<ref name="AE" />

==Etti in the galaxy==
Notable Etti include [[Seyyerin Itoklo]], a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who died during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]; [[Swori Mdimu]], a [[Peace Brigade|Peace Brigadier]] in the same war; and [[Wumdi]], a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]]. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Danetta Pitta]] was part Etti.
